description: Style NoteThese low-top shoes from buckaroo blend vintage styling with a contemporary colour block trend. These classic lace ups with a leather inner gives off a stylish vibe. Style this pair with denims or corduroy trousers and a casual check shirt.Product Details Blue lace-up shoe with red lacesSoft lining and footbed with texturing all over the upperTPU outsole with patterned grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
